meta.description: Create a single straight wall on lvl_test with default height/thickness — exercises CreateWallHandler's schema-default fan-out (id minted, levelId pinned).
deviationsFromPryzm1: id minted via createId('wall') (ULID) — PRYZM 1 used crypto.randomUUID(); fixture pins id for deterministic comparison
no _neighbourSnapshot captured — join cascade deferred to S08 producer (see ADR-008 §3.D)
